member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.ConfigureShotInjuredLegHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the ConfigureShotInjuredLegHelper for sending a ConfigureShotInjuredLeg
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the ConfigureShotInjuredLeg
to.
member.remarks: This single message allows you to configure the injured leg reaction during shot.
